steps.t: It is after midnight at Helm's Deep. Gamling is by the pile of straw on the lower level of the fortress, by the western wall.
It is after midnight at Helm's Deep. Gimli and Legolas are on the Deeping Wall. Gamling told you to take the eastern stairs up onto the wall in order …
It is after midnight at Helm's Deep. Aragorn wishes to speak with you atop the Deeping Wall.
